center.name: Cooloola, Queensland
center.summary: Cooloola is a coastal locality in the Gympie Region, Queensland, Australia.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|Adult feeding on grey box (Eucalyptus microcarpa) flowers|alt=A brownish bird feeding on flowers in a tree The red wattlebird is found in southeast Queensland, where it occurs south of Noosa and Cooloola, becoming more common south of Brisbane and Toowoomba
